reviews.comment:
Más o menos. Más menos que más. Mala atención los pobladores locales se ponen a charlar de bueyes perdidos con los empleados y como si nada frente a colas de dos cuadras aún a la madrugada y en invierno. Nunca hay nafta. Nunca les funciona el postnet.

(Translated by Google)
More or less. More less than more. The service is terrible; the locals chat about nothing with the employees, and it's like nothing's wrong with lines stretching two blocks, even in the early hours of the morning and in winter. They never have gas. Their card reader never works.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcjh2LXBBRRAB
